column3: serve.py exposes `theo_search` and pre-warms the fastembed model at startup; upserts leave embeddings stale and callers rebuild them via `theo_reload` or `theo reindex`.
MCP server reads the config.json layout that project_init writes; both must agree on db_path, CSV locations, and registration format
SKILL.md documents the exact MCP tool surface; a drift between the two silently misguides coding agents
`theo reindex` recomputes all embeddings; `theo reload` reruns `reindex_all` after rebuilding from CSVs so search is usable immediately after a reload.
Integration tests (test_semantic_search, test_reindex, test_reload) cover the full semantic surface; unit tests exercise the pure text-building helpers.
